title: [W]Start of new job
legend: [W]When did the claimant start their new job? (optional)
p1: [W]Tell us about the claimant's new job. If you do not know the exact date then enter the claimant's best estimate.

newJobStartDate.dayRequired: [W]Enter a day for when the claimant's new job starts. For example, 23
newJobStartDate.monthRequired: [W]Enter a month for when the claimant's new job starts. For example, 08
newJobStartDate.yearRequired: [W]Enter a year for when the claimant's new job starts. For example, 2022
newJobStartDate.invalidDateInPast: [W]Date entered must not be in the past
newJobStartDate.invalidDateMoreThanTenYearsInFuture: [W]Enter a date between now and 10 years in the future
newJobStartDate.dayNotANumber: [W]Day must only contain numbers. For example, 23
newJobStartDate.monthNotANumber: [W]Month must only contain numbers. For example, 04
newJobStartDate.yearNotANumber: [W]Year must only contain numbers. For example, 2022
newJobStartDate.invalidDate: [W]New job start date must be a real date.
